issue.title: Broad repo Python reduction sweep AA

branch.name: symphony/BIG-GO-187

commands: find docs bigclaw-go/internal bigclaw-go/cmd -type f -name '*.py' -print 2>/dev/null | sort

blocker.summary: The repository already started physically Python-free, so BIG-GO-187 reduced residual legacy reference density in active docs instead of deleting in-branch .py assets.
